data.body: 9622 implementation COMPLETE across binding_store/dispatch_one/_errors/run_differs/reconcile/__main__/_advisory_lock. All 5 mechanisms done: (1) HTTPError-aware _call_with_retry (429 Retry-After/backoff, 5xx, 404 fast-fail, exhaustion re-raises RAW HTTPError to preserve 8+ downstream catchers - caught a regression in test_applier_stale_binding_404 and fixed via raw re-raise); (2) deterministic write-ahead (bind_pending/record_pending_key + keyed-pending recovery w/ retro-label, no search); (3) comments single-attempt unwrap; (4) recover_pending_bindings client-fix + failure_sink + alert_store + ctx.recovery_failures tally; (5) lease steal in held-lock path via extracted _resolve_held_lock + REBAR_RECONCILER_LOCK_STEAL kill-switch (registered in docs/env-vars.md). Relocated retry helpers to _errors.py to keep dispatch_one under 800 (now 783). 37 new tests across 5 files, all green. make lint + typecheck GREEN. make test running.
